prompt: 在 reactor 用 stm32 拿esp32 mac , rssi 2 個cmd  ,用 cdc cmd

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && echo "=== remote ===" && git remote -v && echo "=== current branch ===" && git branch --show-current && echo "=== status (short) ===" && git status -s | head -20 && echo "=== recent commits ===" && git log --oneline -5
input.description: Check reactor-fw git remote, branch, status
List do_ handler definitions in Master.cpp

input.command: echo "=== file size ===" && wc -l Appli/Source/Applications/usb_command.cpp && echo "=== function line map ===" && grep -n "^int8_t UsbCommand::\|^void UsbCommand::\|^uint8_t UsbCommand::\|UsbCommand::process_sysex_cmd\|UsbCommand::call_command\|UsbCommand::get_esp32_fw\|SYSEX_CMD_\|::process_cdc_msg" Appli/Source/Applications/usb_command.cpp
input.description: Map functions and command handling in usb_command.cpp

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/pg-reactor-esp32-wifi-bt 2>/dev/null && echo "ESP32 repo exists" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null && ls -d main components 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT PRESENT / not a dir"

cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && echo "=== fetch ===" && git fetch origin --quiet && echo done && echo "=== do the 3 M files differ from develop? ===" && git diff --stat origin/develop -- Appli/Source/Interfaces/AudioProcessor.cpp Appli/Source/Interfaces/AudioService.cpp Appli/Source/Interfaces/BleCmdHandler.cpp | tail -5
input.description: Fetch and compare dirty files to develop

input.command: cd /d/mybot/git/reactor-fw && echo "=== CDC subcommand enum (MCU_Version, ESP32_Version, FactoryReset, DFUMode...) ===" && grep -rn "ESP32_Version\|MCU_Version\|Bootloader_Version\|DFUMode\|GetBatteryLevel\|Action_Get\|Action_Set" Appli/Source --include=*.h | grep -iv "usb_command.h\|\.cpp" | head -30

echo "=== get_ble_version + get_esp_ver_callback + Passive_Cmd_Msg_t + esp_version storage in BleCmdHandler ===" && grep -n "get_ble_version\|get_esp_ver_callback\|Passive_Cmd_Msg_t\|_esp_version\|esp_version\|get_pgsys_instance\|cmd_opcode\|uint_param1\|bool_param" Appli/Source/Interfaces/BleCmdHandler.h Appli/Source/Interfaces/BleCmdHandler.cpp | head -50
input.description: Find BleCmdHandler cache getters and msg struct

input.description: Read BleCmdHandler version cache getters and msg struct

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/pg-reactor-esp32-wifi-bt
echo "=== git state ===" && git status -s -uno | head && git branch --show-current
echo "=== dirty? untracked count ===" && git status -s | wc -l

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/git/pg-reactor-esp32-wifi-bt
echo "=== do_get_main_fw_version impl (reply template) ==="
awk '/::do_get_main_fw_version/{f=1} f{print} f&&/^}/{c++} c==1&&f{exit}' components/G1MidiProtocol/G1MidiProtocol.cpp | head -60
